allow: Bash(npm install express cors axios cheerio node-cron dotenv concurrently yahoo-finance2 natural sentiment)
Bash(npm install react-router-dom lucide-react recharts date-fns)

Bash(node -e "import\(''yahoo-finance2''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''Keys:'', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\(''Default type:'', typeof m.default\); const yf = m.default; console.log\(''yf type:'', typeof yf\); console.log\(''yf keys:'', Object.keys\(yf\)\); if \(typeof yf === ''function''\) { const inst = new yf\(\); console.log\(''Instance keys:'', Object.keys\(inst\)\); } }\)")
Bash(node -e "import\(''./server/services/scorer.js''\).then\(m => console.log\(''scorer OK, exports:'', Object.keys\(m\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''ERROR:'', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\(''./server/services/yahooFinance.js''\).then\(m => console.log\(''yahooFinance OK, exports:'', Object.keys\(m\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''ERROR:'', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\(''./server/routes/api.js''\).then\(m => console.log\(''API OK''\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''API ERROR:'', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./server/services/premarketScanner.js''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''Scanner loaded, exports:'', Object.keys\(m\)\); console.log\(''Universe categories:'', Object.keys\(m.STOCK_UNIVERSE\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(''ERROR:'', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\(''./server/services/scorer.js''\).then\(m => console.log\(''Scorer loaded OK''\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''ERROR:'', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); console.log\(''KEY set:'', !!process.env.ALPACA_API_KEY, ''KEY length:'', \(process.env.ALPACA_API_KEY||''''\).length\); console.log\(''SECRET set:'', !!process.env.ALPACA_SECRET_KEY, ''SECRET length:'', \(process.env.ALPACA_SECRET_KEY||''''\).length\); console.log\(''BASE_URL:'', process.env.ALPACA_BASE_URL || ''\(default\)''\);")
